debug_info.goal:
case refine_2
ι : Type u_2
G : ι → Type u_3
inst✝¹ : Fintype ι
inst✝ : (i : ι) → Group (G i)
A : (i : ι) → Set (G i)
K : ι → ℝ
hA : ∀ (i : ι), IsApproximateSubgroup (K i) (A i)
F : (i : ι) → Finset (G i)
hF : ∀ (i : ι), ↑(F i).card ≤ K i
hFS : ∀ (i : ι), A i ^ 2 ⊆ ↑(F i) • A i
⊢ Set.univ.pi A ^ 2 ⊆ ↑(Fintype.piFinset F) • Set.univ.pi A

        intro i
        refine ⟨a i, ha i (by trivial), b i, hb i (by trivial), rfl⟩
      choose f hf using fun i ↦ hFS i (hx' i)
      refine ⟨fun i ↦ f i, ?_, fun i ↦ (hf i).2⟩
      ·
        refine Fintype.mem_piFinset.2 ?_
        intro i
        exact (hf i).1

intro x hx
      rcases hx with ⟨x1, x2, hx1, hx2, rfl⟩
      have hx : ∀ i, x1 i * x2 i ∈ (A i) ^ 2 := by
        intro i
        refine ⟨x1 i, x2 i, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
        · exact hx1 i (by trivial)
        · exact hx2 i (by trivial)
      have hx' : ∀ i, x1 i * x2 i ∈ (↑(F i) : Set (G i)) • A i := fun i ↦ hFS i (hx i)
      choose f hfA hfx using fun i => hx' i
      refine ⟨fun i => f i, fun i => hfA i, ?_, ?_⟩
      · intro i hi
        exact (hfx i).1
      ·
        funext i
        exact (hfx i).2

intro x hx
      rcases hx with ⟨y, hy, z, hz, rfl⟩
      have hy' : ∀ i, y i ∈ A i := by simpa using hy
      have hz' : ∀ i, z i ∈ A i := by simpa using hz
      have hmem : ∀ i, y i * z i ∈ (F i : Set (G i)) • A i := fun i =>
        hFS i (by
          refine ⟨y i, ?_, z i, ?_, rfl⟩ <;> simpa [pow_two] using (hy' i <|> hz' i))
      refine ⟨fun i ↦ Classical.choose (hmem i), ?_, fun i ↦ Classical.choose (Classical.choose_spec (hmem i)), ?_⟩
      · intro i
        exact Classical.choose (Classical.choose_spec (hmem i))
      ·
        ext i
        exact (Classical.choose_spec (Classical.choose_spec (hmem i))).symm

intro x hx
      rcases hx with ⟨a, ha, b, hb, rfl⟩
      rcases hx with ⟨a, ha, b, hb, rfl⟩
      classical
      choose f hfA hf using fun i ↦ hFS i (by
        rcases ha with ⟨haU, ha⟩
        rcases hb with ⟨hbU, hb⟩
        exact ⟨a i, ha, b i, hb, rfl⟩)
      refine ⟨fun i => f i, ?_, ?_⟩
      ·
        have : ∀ i, f i ∈ (F i : Set (G i)) := fun i => (hf i).1
        simpa [Fintype.mem_piFinset] using this
      ·
        refine ⟨fun i => (hf i).2.choose, ?_, ?_⟩
        · exact fun i => (hf i).2.choose_spec.1
        ·
          ext i
          exact (hf i).2.choose_spec.2

intro x hx
      rcases hx with ⟨a, ha, b, hb, rfl⟩
      classical
      have hx' : ∀ i, a i * b i ∈ A i ^ 2 := by
        intro i
        refine ⟨a i, ha i (by trivial), b i, hb i (by trivial), rfl⟩
      have hx'' : ∀ i, a i * b i ∈ (↑(F i) : Set (G i)) • A i := fun i ↦ hFS i (hx' i)
      choose f hfA hf using fun i ↦ hx'' i
      refine ⟨fun i ↦ f i, ?_, fun i ↦ hfA i⟩
      ·
        refine Fintype.mem_piFinset ?_
        intro i
        exact hf i
